channel.title: GitHub Tcl Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Tcl in GitHub

item.title: rdbende/Sun-Valley-ttk-theme
item.description: A gorgeous theme for Tkinter/ttk, based on the Sun Valley visual style ✨

item.title: TinyTapeout/tt06-verilog-template
item.description: Submission template for Tiny Tapeout 06 - Verilog HDL Projects

item.title: Digilent/digilent-xdc
item.description: A collection of Master XDC files for Digilent FPGA and Zynq boards.

item.title: Xilinx/device-tree-xlnx
item.description: Linux device tree generator for the Xilinx SDK (Vivado > 2014.1)
